comment: Suppress specific yarn-audit advisories with a stated reason and review date. Entries surface a CI warning past their `review` date but do not fail the audit job. See SUPPLY-CHAIN-SECURITY.md §5 — every entry must reference an advisory that is not exploitable in this app's actual code paths, with the rationale stated below. `dateAdded` is when the entry first landed; `review` is when the rationale should be re-evaluated.

allowlist.title: Next.js HTTP request deserialization can lead to DoS when using insecure React Server Components
allowlist.reason: RSC-only DoS path. App Router only. This app is Pages Router (no app/ directory, no "use server"/"use client" directives, no middleware.ts), so the vulnerable code path is not reachable. Cleared by upgrading to next>=15.0.8; tracked under the Next 14 → 15 migration TODO.

allowlist.title: Next.js has a Denial of Service with Server Components
allowlist.reason: RSC-only DoS path. App Router only — not reachable in this Pages-Router app. Cleared by upgrading to next>=15.5.15; tracked under the Next 14 → 15 migration TODO.
